title: Virtual Camera Function
description:
Virtual Camera Function

Virtual Camera Function

Checking the [Virtual] checkbox in the camera configuration dialog box enables the camera to work in the virtual mode.

In this mode, the image processing functions on the development PC, whether a camera is actually installed.

(Although the actual connection of the camera is not necessary, it requires the image file for the image processing.)

When starting more than one Epson RC+ 8.0 by one PC, virtual camera is only available in the first session.
